subcodes.first_line: O ye twin heralds of the Cause of God! His Holiness Haji Nabil hath highly praised and extolled your teaching work [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مبلغ امرالله حضرت حاجی نبیل نهایت تعریف و توصیف از درس تبلیغ شما نموده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
